jobs.title: Senior Director, Engineering
jobs.summary: Founding R&D leader for Intercom's new Berlin hub. Building and scaling a world-class engineering organization (100+ engineers planned). Reports to VP Engineering. Intercom is an AI customer service company with market-leading AI agent Fin. Requires Director+ experience at high-growth tech companies, track record leading 100+ engineers, experience establishing or scaling engineering sites/hubs. Hybrid (3 days/week in-office). Visa sponsorship available.

jobs.title: VP Software Engineering, Agentforce Marketing
jobs.salary: $515K-$1.18M+ total comp (Levels.fyi estimate for Salesforce VP Eng)
jobs.summary: Lead the next generation of Agentforce Marketing platforms. Drive transformation of Marketing Cloud into an AI-first, agentic engagement platform where intelligent agents orchestrate journeys, generate content, optimize decisions, and proactively engage customers. Design and scale globally distributed, cloud-native systems for real-time personalization, orchestration, and decisioning at enterprise scale. 10+ years eng leadership, 5+ years senior executive roles.
jobs.verified: UNCERTAIN — WebFetch returns 404 on Salesforce career URLs (likely WAF), but role still indexed in site search

jobs.title: VP, Software Engineering - Revenue Cloud
jobs.location: Bellevue, WA / Seattle, WA / Palo Alto, CA / San Francisco, CA
jobs.salary: $515K-$1.18M+ total comp (Levels.fyi estimate for Salesforce VP Eng)
jobs.summary: Lead the next evolution of Revenue Cloud — end-to-end Revenue Lifecycle Management and Monetization platform. Own technical vision, architecture, and execution for next-generation Agentic Revenue Management (ARM) platform. Unifies configuration, pricing, quoting, contracting, order management, and billing on the Salesforce platform.
